title: Google doubles down on cheaper, faster AI — but says Gemini 3.5 Pro still isn't ready
excerpt: Google unveiled Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash Lite, and Flash Cyber as it focuses on bringing down AI costs, but competitors have taken the frontier.
content_html:
By Hugh Langley

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

Google is rolling out some new AI models — but not the one that many were expecting.

The company announced on Tuesday three Gemini models that it said are faster and cheaper to run AI agents, as Google continues to double down on efficiency over raw power.

That's not entirely by choice: Google said that Gemini 3.5 Pro, the new frontier model it originally promised for June, is still in testing. Google also teased Gemini 4, the next big flagship model, although that is not expected for several months.

Of the new models rolling out this week, Google describes 3.6 Flash as the "workhorse" that is better than 3.5 Flash at tasks such as coding. Google said 3.6 Flash reduces token usage — units of text processed by AI — by up to 17% compared to its predecessor, according to analysis from Artificial Analysis Index, a benchmark for comparing AI tools.

Google also unveiled 3.5 Flash-Lite, which it says is its fastest and "most cost-effective" version of its 3.5 model yet.

Then there's 3.5 Flash Cyber, which is designed to find and fix cybersecurity vulnerabilities at a performance level similar to rivals but at a "lower price per token than larger models," Tulsee Doshi, senior director of product management in Google's Gemini group, said in a blog post.

That last part is crucial. Anthropic and OpenAI have both rolled out cybersecurity models in recent months, but it seems that, again, Google is hoping to undercut the competition on cost. Google said Flash Cyber will initially be exclusively available to governments and trusted partners.

With the realization that using lots of tokens doesn't always merit the best results, more companies are reining in their AI spending and turning to more cost-conscious models. That gives Google a strategic opening.

"Companies are already blowing through their annual token budgets, and it's only May," Google CEO Sundar Pichai said earlier this year. "If companies used a mix of Flash and other frontier models, they could save a lot of money."

Google says its new models hit the "sweet spot" of efficiency and power for running agents.

No sign of 3.5 Pro

Gemini 3.5 Pro, Google's next big frontier model, is being tested with partners and will ship it "as soon as it's ready," the company said.

Business Insider reported in June that Google had pushed the targeted release date for 3.5 Pro to July. Bloomberg recently reported the model may have been further delayed.

As of Tuesday, Google hasn't got a single model among the top 10 ranking in the Artificial Analysis leaderboard, which uses a composite benchmark to score models across areas including maths and reasoning.

Google also said on Tuesday that it has begun its "most ambitious pre-training run yet" for Gemini 4, its next major model.

Typically, Google launches these big flagship models at the very end of the year, and it's not yet clear whether the 3.5 Pro will be powerful enough to vault Google back to the bleeding edge in the interim.

However, as companies take a more considered approach to their AI spend and cap their token usage, Google is positioning itself for the moment.

Read next

Hugh Langley

content_html_zh:
作者：Hugh Langley 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

谷歌正在推出一些新的人工智能模型，但并不是许多人所期待的。

该公司周二宣布了三款 Gemini 模型，称随着谷歌继续加倍提高原始功率的效率，运行人工智能代理速度更快、成本更低。

这并不完全是出于选择：谷歌表示，最初承诺在 6 月推出的新前沿型号 Gemini 3.5 Pro 仍在测试中。 谷歌还透露了下一代大型旗舰机型 Gemini 4，尽管预计几个月后才会出现。

在本周推出的新型号中，谷歌将 3.6 Flash 描述为“主力”，在编码等任务上比 3.5 Flash 更好。 谷歌表示，根据比较人工智能工具的基准人工分析指数的分析，与前身相比，3.6 Flash 减少了令牌使用量（人工智能处理的文本单位）高达 17%。

谷歌还推出了 3.5 Flash-Lite，据称这是 3.5 型号迄今为止速度最快且“最具成本效益”的版本。

谷歌 Gemini 集团产品管理高级总监 Tulsee Doshi 在一篇博客文章中表示，3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 旨在发现和修复网络安全漏洞，其性能水平与竞争对手相似，但“每个代币的价格比大型型号更低”。

最后一部分至关重要。 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 近几个月都推出了网络安全模型，但谷歌似乎再次希望在成本方面削弱竞争。 谷歌表示，Flash Cyber​​ 最初将专门向政府和值得信赖的合作伙伴开放。

随着意识到使用大量代币并不总是能带来最佳结果，越来越多的公司开始控制人工智能支出，并转向更具成本意识的模型。 这为谷歌提供了战略机会。

谷歌首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊(Sundar Pichai)今年早些时候表示：“公司已经耗尽了年度代币预算，而且现在才五月份。” “如果公司混合使用 Flash 和其他前沿模型，他们可以节省大量资金。”

谷歌表示，其新模型达到了运行代理的效率和功率的“最佳点”。

没有3.5 Pro的迹象

该公司表示，Gemini 3.5 Pro 是谷歌的下一个大型前沿型号，正在与合作伙伴进行测试，并将“一旦准备就绪”就会发货。

Business Insider 6 月份报道称，谷歌已将 3.5 Pro 的目标发布日期推迟到 7 月。 彭博社最近报道称，该模型可能会进一步推迟。

截至周二，谷歌还没有一个模型跻身人工分析排行榜前十名，该排行榜使用综合基准对数学和推理等领域的模型进行评分。

谷歌周二还表示，它已经开始为其下一个主要模型 Gemini 4 进行“迄今为止最雄心勃勃的预训练”。

通常，谷歌会在年底推出这些大型旗舰机型，目前尚不清楚 3.5 Pro 是否强大到足以让谷歌在此期间重新回到领先地位。

然而，随着公司对人工智能支出采取更加深思熟虑的方法并限制其代币使用，谷歌目前正在自我定位。
